16.dv: a primitive root; (Isaiah 30:21; interchangeable with H541 (אָמַן), to go to the right hand)

16.gl: to place (in a very wide application)
16.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

16.dv: or חֵק; and חוֹק; from an unused root, apparently meaning to inclose;

16.gl: something born, i.e. a lad or offspring
16.kj: boy, child, fruit, son, young man (one).
